data.title: Cysic joins Succinct Prover Network to bolster zero-knowledge infrastructure
data.description:
Cysic, which offers a Layer 1 network for zero-knowledge proof generation and verification, will join Succinct as a multi-node prover.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/362714/cysic-joins-succinct-prover-network-to-supercharge-zero-knowledge-infrastructure?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Binance: We will optimize the Alpha process and crack down on violations. Severe violations may result in permanent bans
data.description:
Binance Wallet released an announcement on the X platform. The team thanked users for participating in and providing feedback on the Alpha airdrop event, and promised to continue to optimize the user experience. The platform will launch a number of optimization measures, including advance notification and simplified processes, to improve the fairness and convenience of airdrop participation.
In response to some users' feedback on violations, the platform has launched a multi-dimensional investigation. If any user is found to have violated the rules of the event, corresponding measures will be taken, and those with serious circumstances may be permanently banned.

data.title: Decentralized messaging protocol XMTP completes $20 million Series B financing, led by a16z crypto and others
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: Ephemera, the developer of the decentralized messaging protocol XMTP, has completed a $20 million Series B financing round, led by Union Square Ventures, a16z crypto and Lightspeed Faction, with participation from Coinbase Ventures, Offline Ventures, Sound Ventures and Distributed Global. After this round of financing, Ephemera's equity valuation is $300 million, and the broader network valuation of the XMTP protocol, which will issue tokens, is $750 million.
The XMTP protocol has now been integrated into Coinbase's newly launched Base application, upgrading from an optional feature to core infrastructure. The protocol provides end-to-end encrypted communication services and supports secure interactions between wallet addresses. The test network was launched in February this year. Ephemera said it will expand the team size to promote the launch of the protocol mainnet and ecological construction. USV partner Fred Wilson will join its board of directors. (The Block)

data.title: Binance Launches CreatorPad on Binance Square to Boost Crypto Content and Community Engagement
data.description: Key Takeaways:Binance introduces CreatorPad, a new feature on Binance Square to reward crypto content creators.The platform enables task-based campaigns for creators and real-time ranking via the Mindshare Leaderboard.Projects can launch verified campaigns to reach Binance Square’s 35 million+ monthly active users.The initiative emphasizes quality over quantity, rewarding meaningful engagement and insights.Binance announced the launch of CreatorPad, a new content monetization and community engagement platform built into its social hub, Binance Square. The feature is designed to reward crypto creators for high-quality content while helping Web3 projects connect with engaged users across Binance Square’s growing base of 35 million monthly active users.The platform enables task-based campaigns, where creators earn rewards for completing activities like publishing educational posts, using campaign hashtags, or interacting with project-related discussions. CreatorPad automatically tracks these contributions and displays creator rankings via the Mindshare Leaderboard, which highlights consistent and insightful engagement.Unlike typical engagement bounties, CreatorPad prioritizes authenticity and thoughtfulness. Binance has built the system to discourage spam and low-effort content, reinforcing its broader goal of building meaningful conversations and grassroots momentum around blockchain projects.“This launch marks an important step in facilitating the democratization of content within the crypto space,” said Jeff Li, Head of Product at Binance. “Whether you’re an experienced influencer or just getting started, CreatorPad gives anyone the chance to earn recognition and rewards through active participation and valuable insights.”A New Era of Crypto-Community CollaborationProjects using CreatorPad can launch customized campaigns, discover top creators, and amplify their reach with trusted voices in the crypto community. The tool is fully integrated into Binance Square, allowing seamless visibility and interaction.The first official Mindshare campaigns are already live, with more to be added in the coming weeks. The platform supports over 30 languages, enabling creators and projects to connect across global markets with localized content strategies.With an emphasis on transparency, automation, and quality, CreatorPad represents Binance’s continued effort to build user-first tools that help scale community-led growth in the Web3 ecosystem.

data.title: U.S. Weekly Jobless Claims Reach New Low in July
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, the number of initial jobless claims in the United States for the week ending July 12 was reported at 221,000, surpassing expectations of 235,000. This figure marks the lowest level since the week ending April 12, 2025. The previous week's data was revised from 227,000 to 228,000.
source: https://www.binance.com/en/square/post/27066587451450?utm_source=BinanceNewsRSS

data.title: ChainCatcher Announces Key Partnerships and Market Strategies
data.description:
ChainCatcher partners with Alibaba Cloud, launches SOPH trading, impacting ETH market.
source: https://coincu.com/349179-chaincatcher-partnerships-soph-trading-impact

data.title: Arthur Hayes Highlights ECB's Banknote Design Initiative
data.description: According to Foresight News, Arthur Hayes shared a social media post from the European Central Bank (ECB) regarding its call for new banknote designs. Hayes remarked that the comments were overwhelmingly active. Among the responses, there was a design featuring the Ethereum logo.

data.title: BTC Digital strategically shifts to Ethereum and no longer holds Bitcoin, and completes $6 million in financing
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Nasdaq-listed BTC Digital Ltd. (code: BTCT) announced that it will shift its core asset strategy from Bitcoin to Ethereum and completed $6 million in financing. The company has built a position of $1 million in ETH for the first time. In the future, it will convert all existing and new BTC assets into ETH, with the goal of achieving tens of millions of dollars in Ethereum reserves by the end of the year.
CEO Peng Siguang said that Ethereum has become the preferred platform for decentralized finance, tokenization of real assets, and scalable smart contracts. BTCT will launch an ETH staking plan, expand the asset pool through profit reinvestment, and participate in DeFi, RWA and stablecoin projects, transforming into a digital asset operator with production assets as the core.
BTCT previously focused on mining business, covering mine construction, mining pools and data center operations. In the future, it will focus on infrastructure such as ETH staking, liquidity pools, stablecoin reserves and cross-chain settlement. (Investing)

data.title: BTC Digital Announces Strategic Shift to Ethereum as Core Asset
data.description:
According to Foresight News, blockchain technology company BTC Digital (NASDAQ: BTCT) has announced a transformative strategic shift, focusing on Ethereum (ETH) as its core asset and operational foundation. As part of this initiative, BTCT has secured $6 million in funding and added a $1 million ETH position.

The company plans to convert all existing and future Bitcoin holdings into ETH to establish a long-term, efficient on-chain asset pool. This move aims to achieve medium to long-term growth centered around the Ethereum ecosystem.

data.title: BitMine Immersion's Ethereum Holdings Reach $1 Billion for Treasury Strategy
data.description: According to BlockBeats, BitMine Immersion's Ethereum holdings have reached a value of $1 billion. This substantial amount is being utilized as part of the company's Ethereum treasury strategy. The move highlights BitMine Immersion's significant investment in Ethereum, reflecting its strategic approach to managing digital assets.

data.title: U.S. Retail Sales Surge in June, Exceeding Expectations
data.description: According to BlockBeats, U.S. retail sales for June increased by 0.6%, marking the highest growth since March this year. This figure surpassed market expectations, which had predicted a modest rise of 0.1%.

This figure marks the lowest level since the week ending April 12, 2025. The previous week's data was revised from 227,000 to 228,000.

data.title: Publicly listed BitMine Immersion reveals that its Ethereum holdings are worth more than $1 billion
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: BitMine Immersion, a listed company, announced today that the value of its Ethereum and Ethereum equivalents has exceeded $1 billion. In order to advance its asset-light treasury strategy, the company completed its first round of private equity financing of $250 million on July 8. According to Bloomberg data, as of 3:45 a.m. Eastern Time on July 17, the company held a total of 300,657 Ethereum1, with an average price of $3,461.89. (PR Newswire)

data.title: ChangeNOW Redefines Crypto Speed Standards with Sub-2-Minute Swaps
data.description:
The crypto exchange platform ChangeNOW has reached a new performance milestone, officially announcing an average cryptocurrency processing time of under two minutes, with a median of four minutes, placing it at the forefront of transaction speed and user experience among non-custodial services in Web3. As Web3 platforms mature, crypto transfer times have become a decisive […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/changenow-redefines-crypto-speed-standards-with-sub-2-minute-swaps/

data.title: SOL Treasury Company DeFi Dev Corp Launches "DFDV Treasury Accelerator" to Promote SOL Global Treasury Model
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News SOL Treasury Company DeFi Dev Corp announced the launch of the "DFDV Financial Accelerator", a strategic franchise model to help build public SOL treasury tools worldwide. The alliance includes Kraken, Pantera, Arrington, RK Capital and Borderless Capital, and they are expected to support the launch of new regional investment tools through potential investments, strategic guidance and infrastructure.
DFDV is actively developing five financial accelerator regions and incorporating new regions every week. Under this framework, DFDV will provide franchise partners with operational, strategic and technical infrastructure, including verification nodes and asset management solutions, financial and financing guidance, and brand integration, while retaining equity in investment tools in each region. Pantera partners said that this model is different from the traditional MicroStrategy style and is reshaping the way crypto capital is formed.

data.title: Former Fed governor: Trump is right to publicly push for Fed rate cuts
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Former Fed Governor Walsh: Trump is right to publicly push the Fed (to cut interest rates). (Jinshi)

data.title: Reporter: The GENIUS Act is expected to pass and be sent to Trump for signature
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Crypto journalist Eleanor Terrett wrote on the X platform, "Cryptocurrency Week continues, and the House of Representatives is expected to vote on important issues such as the GENIUS Act. The bill is expected to pass and be sent to Trump for signature. The White House has arranged a signing ceremony tomorrow.
In the Senate, U.S. Senator Tim Scott will host a roundtable meeting at 9 a.m. Eastern Time, focusing on the future of digital asset regulation and compliance."

data.title: OKX Wallet launches exclusive TAKER airdrop query event
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, OKX Wallet has now opened TAKER airdrop inquiries. Users can connect through the OKX Wallet plug-in or App and start receiving it at 6 pm (UTC+8) on July 18.
It is reported that Taker Protocol is a cross-chain DeFi platform focusing on Bitcoin liquidity. Through the innovative Nominated Proof-of-Liquidity (NPoL) consensus mechanism, it enhances the utility of Bitcoin in staking, lending and trading.

data.title: Sonic to launch AI-driven development platform Spark, allowing users to build and deploy full-stack decentralized applications without programming
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Sonic announced that it will launch the Spark platform, an AI-driven development platform that allows users to build and deploy full-stack decentralized applications without programming. The platform is powered by Google's Gemini large language model and has key features such as code-free full-stack construction, self-debugging, built-in security logic, and context-aware interface. Spark is still under development and early access will be available soon.

data.title: Binance Alpha to List Aspecta (ASP)
data.description: Binance announced on X that Binance Alpha will list Aspecta (ASP), with trading to open on July 24, 2025. Eligible users will be able to claim an airdrop using Binance Alpha Points on the Alpha Events page once trading opens, with further details to be announced.
